description: Canonical weight values at representative ages using the default config (halfLifeDays=90, minWeight=0.1). See SPEC §10.4.
notes: At age 360 days the raw value is 2^(-4) = 0.0625, below minWeight, so the clamp produces 0.1. At age 1000 days the raw value is essentially zero and clamps to 0.1. All other values are below the clamp threshold.
